title: Arlong Puts a Price on the Village
scene: On pages 9–12, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. The flashback reaches Arlong’s arrival, his money demands, and Bellemere’s impossible choice.

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Let's use the back door,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: to escape with Belliemere!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But... what if the pirates are already here?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't worry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wait! You can't go back to your home!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This may be too cruel to hear for you girls,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But listen carefully...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Belliemere!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: UAG- HHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's no good...! These guys are literally monsters! I'm going to be killed!

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Nojiko... Nami...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Belliemere, you fool!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't throw your life away just because of some inane sense of justice!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This is a meaning- less fight!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You can solve it with money alone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GEN...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's as he says, Marine Girl...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: 100 grand for one human adult, and so grand for one human child. As long as each household can pay that amount, the village will be fine.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Each house- hold...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Belliemere, how much money do you have saved up?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Not nearly enough...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Even with my secret savings, I barely have 100 grand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Arlong!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There's a meal set up for 3 people inside!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: 3 People must be living here!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Belliemere...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just pay the amount for one adult.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You invited me for tonight's dinner, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So hurry up lest the food go cold...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Good thing you had enough money...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: Looks like all the villagers are safe for now.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ACCOR- DING TO THE TOWN REGISTRY,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This woman's never been married nor had any children.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Alright then...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: THAT'LL BE 100,000 BELI THEN. ARE YOU GOING TO PAY UP OR WOULD YOU RATHER DIE INSTEAD?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you understand? Nojiko, Nami...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's no proof that you're belliemere's daughters.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So while those pirates are blind to your existence,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You two need to leave this vill... no, this island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Cross the ocean and run away as far as you can.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm afraid this is the only way all 3 of you can be saved!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No! Why do we have to leave!?

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: I want to stay and live here in this village...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Is it because we're poor...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Can't we be Belliemere's daughters anymore...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Doc, this is too much for them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We can't just send these young girls off to the sea alone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They might die out there!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Family or their lives!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We can't afford any other alter- natives in this crisis!

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
